term.shortTerm: Perfect Fullstack skills with NestJS and ReactJS, master DevOps/CI/CD to optimize the software development process. Directly contribute to building system architecture and resolving performance and security challenges for FinTech/Banking projects.
term.longTerm: Become a Senior Fullstack Developer or Solution Architect within the next 3 years. Capable of designing and operating large, high-load systems while participating in the technological orientation for the enterprise.

timeline.title: University Graduation
timeline.subtitle: Posts and Telecommunications Institute of Technology (PTIT)
timeline.description: Bachelor of Information Technology (Distance Education Program)

description.shortDescription: Educational SaaS system built entirely from scratch.

exp.title: System Analysis and Design
exp.content: Received requirements from clients, designed overall architecture, and modeled PostgreSQL database using Prisma ORM.

exp.title: Fullstack Development
exp.content: Built RESTful APIs with NestJS. Developed a modern, high-performance frontend using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

exp.title: DevOps & Deployment
exp.content: Managed CI/CD pipelines and containerized the application with Docker to ensure smooth operation in the production environment.

description.shortDescription: Designed and developed a modern landing page for a construction equipment company.

exp.title: UI/UX Design & Implementation
exp.content: Designed Bento Box layout, Hero Section with dark mode and circular images, auto-carousel, and fully responsive across all devices.

exp.title: CI/CD Deployment
exp.content: Configured GitLab CI pipeline and Firebase Hosting for auto deployment, Docker containerization for production environment.

description.shortDescription: Discord RPG game bot: turn-based dragon battle with gacha system, real-time multiplayer.

exp.title: Backend Architecture Design
exp.content: Designed PostgreSQL schema with Prisma ORM, managed real-time battle state, handled concurrent interactions from multiple players.

exp.title: Docker Containerization
exp.content: Deployed multi-container setup with Docker Compose (Bot + PostgreSQL + Redis), multi-stage Dockerfile, auto-restart and health checks.

exp.title: Game Engine Development
exp.content: Built BattleManager handling turn-based combat, speed-based priority, skill system, and EXP/Level progression.

description.shortDescription: Personal portfolio website with dark glassmorphism design, multi-language, animated UI.

exp.title: Design System Implementation
exp.content: Built a complete glassmorphism design system: glass cards, animated progress bars, particle background, responsive across all devices.

exp.title: Multi-language & Multi-theme
exp.content: Integrated i18next for multi-language (VI/EN), 4-theme system (Dark, Light, Green, Orange) with CSS variables.

description.shortDescription: Internal Management System (ANS Admin Portal) - Building and operating the entire internal management website, integrating automated notification services.

exp.title: Backend Development
exp.content: Developed using NestJS and PostgreSQL database, ensuring high performance and security.

exp.title: Frontend Development
exp.content: Built a modern UI with ReactJS and the PrimeReact library.

exp.title: DevOps & CI/CD
exp.content: Set up CI/CD pipelines to automate the deployment process, minimizing human errors.

exp.title: Services Integration
exp.content: Integrated notification modules via Telegram Bot and Zalo Notification Service for real-time alerts.

description.shortDescription: Enterprise transaction software development for MB.

exp.title: UI Development
exp.content: Designed and implemented the enterprise system interface using Angular 16 with Micro Frontend architecture, ensuring responsiveness across devices.

exp.title: Performance Optimization
exp.content: Applied lazy loading and dynamic import techniques to reduce average page load time to under 2 seconds.

exp.title: Banking Business Logic Handling
exp.content: Collaborated with backend team to handle foreign currency transfer flows and accurately assess business features, ensuring data consistency.

exp.title: Reusable Component System
exp.content: Developed an internal UI component library, reducing development effort for new features by over 30% and improving consistency.

description.shortDescription: Internal notification management system for MB.

exp.title: Notification Feature Development
exp.content: Developed the internal notification module, enabling message delivery and reception across departments.

exp.title: Business Flow Analysis
exp.content: Analyzed and mapped the entire backend-to-frontend workflow for the notification feature.

description.shortDescription: Prize wheel program on the MBBank app.

exp.title: Game UI Development
exp.content: Created the spinning prize wheel interface using Angular and animations aligned with frontend logic.

exp.title: Responsive Optimization
exp.content: Ensured smooth performance across various screen sizes using responsive layout techniques.

description.shortDescription: Prize management software for MB Bank.

exp.title: Prize Logic Implementation
exp.content: Designed and implemented frontend logic for the prize draw system, ensuring correct business operation.

description.shortDescription: Customer management portal for Tien Phong Bank.

exp.title: RM System Development
exp.content: Developed features for reporting, CIF checking, and RM360/CB/RB management as per bank requirements.

description.shortDescription: Core banking account management system for enterprise clients.

exp.title: Enterprise Data Flow Handling
exp.content: Created UI for enterprise account mapping and operations involving organizational banking clients.

exp.title: Large-scale Business UI Development
exp.content: Designed complex business interfaces including date logic handling and multi-level form structures.

exp.title: UI Performance Optimization
exp.content: Enhanced large dataset rendering through module splitting and lazy loading.
